title: Daily Fortune
description: Deterministic daily fortune/lab-omen state. The tool owns scores and daily repeat behavior; the model reacts naturally.
notes: Use for daily fortune, daily experiment, 今日运势, 今日状态, or similar lightweight group-state requests.
The same user receives the same result for the same day.
The model may comment on the result, but must not invent scores, themes, or leaderboard order.

actions.description: Draw or read today's deterministic fortune for one Telegram user.
Read one user's daily fortune status.
